label: clade-specific protein
def: A lineage- or clade-specific (taxonomically restricted) protein, present only within a particular taxon; the NCBITaxon xref gives the clade.

label: conserved protein
def: A protein that is evolutionarily conserved — orthologues are retained across multiple taxa. When scoped to a clade, the record carries an NCBITaxon xref (conserved at that taxon rank).

label: cloud protein
def: A cloud protein — present in only a few genomes of the pangenome (rare accessory).

label: core-genome protein
def: A core-genome protein — present in (nearly) all genomes of a species/clade pangenome.

label: persistent-genome protein
def: A persistent-genome protein — the near-core partition in the PPanGGOLiN pangenome model.

label: shell protein
def: A shell / accessory (dispensable) protein — present in a subset of genomes of the pangenome.

label: singleton protein
def: A singleton / strain-specific protein — present in a single genome of the pangenome.

label: soft-core protein
def: A soft-core protein — present in most (e.g. >= 95%) genomes of the pangenome.

label: variable protein
def: A variable / hypervariable / fast-evolving protein or region with low cross-taxon conservation.
